new_classes.label_en: Tokaj wine, in containers > 2 l and ≤ 10 l (CN 2204 22 33)
new_classes.label_de: Tokaj, in Behältnissen mit einem Inhalt von mehr als 2 l bis einschließlich 10 l (KN 2204 22 33)
new_classes.definition_en: Wine bearing the Tokaj designation of origin (PDO), presented in containers of more than 2 litres and not more than 10 litres, classified under CN subheading 2204 22 33 pursuant to additional note 4(B)(b) to Chapter 22.

coverage_explanation: The four core discriminating criteria are covered: (1) Tokaj designation of origin (TokajOriginQuality), (2) PDO wine status (PDOWineQuality), (3) fresh grape origin (FreshGrapeOriginQuality), and (4) container volume > 2 L and ≤ 10 L (MediumContainer2To10L). The legal note refers to additional note 4(B)(b) to Chapter 22, which specifies the detailed compositional and organoleptic requirements for Tokaj wines (e.g. sugar content, Aszú grades, etc.). These sub-criteria within the Tokaj PDO definition are not yet fully modelled as separate quality classes in the TBox (e.g. Szamorodni, Aszú, dry/sweet distinctions), so coverage is 0.85 rather than 1.0. The existing TokajOriginQuality class abstracts over these details. The container size range (> 2 L, ≤ 10 L) is captured via the existing MediumContainer2To10L class. No new properties were needed.
